Then you may enjoy Elements of Statistical Learning[1] or Kevin Murphy's books[2][3][4], which this chapter is heavily indebted to; it is mostly a short gloss of the topics covered in those books.[1]: https://hastie.su.domains/ElemStatLearn/[2]: https://probml.github.io/pml-book/book0.html[3]: https://probml.github.io/pml-book/book1.html[4]: https://probml.github.io/pml-book/book2.html
